title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. subcrenata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. subcrenata, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. subcrenata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, ease menstrual cramps, and support the healing of internal and external injuries. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and creams, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including eczema, acne, and minor skin irritations.
